This [[Human/Legends|Human]] was present at the victory parade in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] following the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Behind the scenes==
This character was played by [[Madison Lloyd]], younger sister of [[Jake Lloyd]] and was mentioned as Ellie in Call Sheets of {{Film|I}}.<ref name="Call Sheets">{{WebCite|url=https://ukm.propstoreauction.com/lot-details/index/catalog/299/lot/81116|text=Lot #910 - STAR WARS: THE PHANTOM MENACE (1999) - Kenny Baker Estate Collection: Kenny Baker Personal Script Pages, Call Sheets and Premiere Tickets|date=2021-11-09|archiveurl=https://archive.is/wip/9pKE9}} ([https://archive.is/aTCxP specific page])</ref> In an interview in [[Star Wars Insider 39|''Star Wars Insider'' 39]], Jake Lloyd revealed this character was called Princess Ellie. However, this name has never appeared in any canon source, and [[Leland Chee]] has stated that the character does not have an official name.<ref name="SWBoards">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1140|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|nobackup=1}}</ref>
